prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科主榜 2021–2026 年稳定第 10 名，属全国顶尖高校层次；2026 年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及师德师风事件（领导与学生不正当关系谣言），但警方已立案调查并澄清；抖音热度排名第 24（较热），短视频曝光量中等偏上；历史投档异常记录中未见西安交大明显断档信号；动力工程及工程热物理 A+、电气工程 A+、控制科学与工程 A+、机械工程 A+、计算机科学与技术 A、数学 A、材料科学与工程 A、工商管理 A、管理科学与工程 A、力学 A、生物医学工程 A-、电子科学与技术 A-，共 12 个 A- 及以上学科，工科实力极强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业持续高热推荐，与西安交大王牌工科高度契合，对高分考生吸引力强；本省物理类考生 2021 年 14.7 万→2025 年 25.0 万持续增长，2026 年总考生 39.37 万，按近年物理类占比约 60.6% 估算约 23.86 万人，较 2025 年减少约 1.12 万人（-4.5%），竞争略有缓解，2025 年物理类本科批 426 分、特殊类型线 516 分，近年波动不大；西安交大位于陕西（非本省），在湖北招生占比约 0.1%（2021–2023 年数据），属跨省招生，无本省偏好优势。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年位次大幅后移趋势、2026 年扩招 12% 加剧竞争、考生总数小幅下降缓解竞争、声誉偏负面轻微抑制报考热度、王牌工科专业持续高热吸引高分考生等多重因素，扩招是主导因素，位次预计继续后移；预测最低位次约 6521 名，区间 6021–7021 名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间 6021–7021 名内，建议以二档工科试验班为主力选择，一档钱学森班/卓越计划作为冲刺，三档临床医学和经济学类作为保底；位次明显优于区间下限（<6021）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（>7021）建议以三档为主、二档为辅。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 4715→4670→4682→4890→6109. From 2021 to 2024, it remained stable in the 4700–4900 range, but in 2025 it dropped significantly to 6109, a single-year decline of about 1219 places, showing an overall downward trend. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 6109. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 177 in 2021, 175 in 2022, 100 in 2023, 169 in 2024, and 166 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 186, an increase of 20 students (+12.0%) compared to 2025, a relatively large expansion that will intensify competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science Main Ranking stable at 10th from 2021 to 2026, placing it among the top national universities. In 2026, reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving a teacher ethics incident (rumors of inappropriate relationships between leaders and students), but police have filed a case and clarified the situation. Douyin popularity ranking 24th (relatively hot), short video exposure moderately high. No significant gap signals in historical admission records for Xi'an Jiaotong University. Disciplines: Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics A+, Electrical Engineering A+, Control Science and Engineering A+, Mechanical Engineering A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Mathematics A, Materials Science and Engineering A, Business Administration A, Management Science and Engineering A, Mechanics A, Biomedical Engineering A-, Electronic Science and Technology A-, totaling 12 A- or above disciplines, with extremely strong engineering capabilities.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation remain highly popular and recommended, highly aligned with Xi'an Jiaotong University's flagship engineering disciplines, attracting high-scoring candidates. The number of Physics Category candidates in the province grew from 147,000 in 2021 to 250,000 in 2025, with a total of 393,700 candidates in 2026. Based on the recent Physics Category proportion of about 60.6%, it is estimated at approximately 238,600, a decrease of about 11,200 (-4.5%) from 2025, slightly easing competition. In 2025, the Physics Category undergraduate batch line was 426 points, and the special type line was 516 points, with little fluctuation in recent years. Xi'an Jiaotong University is located in Shaanxi (not this province), with enrollment in Hubei accounting for about 0.1% (2021–2023 data), making it cross-provincial enrollment with no local preference advantage.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant downward trend in rankings in 2025, the 12% enrollment expansion in 2026 intensifying competition, a slight decrease in total candidates easing competition, a somewhat negative reputation mildly suppressing application enthusiasm, and the continued high popularity of flagship engineering majors attracting high-scoring candidates, the expansion is the dominant factor, and rankings are expected to continue declining. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 6521, with a range of 6021–7021.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 6021–7021, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Engineering Pilot Classes as the main choice, with Tier 1 Qian Xuesen Class/Excellence Programs as a reach, and Tier 3 Clinical Medicine and Economics as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (<6021), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors. If your ranking is near the upper limit (>7021), it is recommended to prioritize Tier 3 with Tier 2 as supplementary.

prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年位次平稳、2026 年缩招 11% 缓解竞争、历史类考生增加 9.7% 加剧竞争、声誉偏负面轻微抑制报考热度、法学专业偏热吸引考生等多重因素，考生增加与缩招相互抵消，位次预计基本持平略前移；预测最低位次约 1406 名，区间 1206–1606 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 1351→1480→1372→1473→1485, fluctuating narrowly within the 1350–1490 range, with a 2025 baseline of about 1485; local History Category enrollment plans were 7 in 2021, 11 in 2022, 13 in 2023, 14 in 2024, and 18 in 2025, showing a continuous expansion trend; the 2026 plan is 16, a reduction of 2 (-11.1%) from 2025, slightly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked 10th on the Soft Science main list, belonging to the top tier of national universities; the 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving teacher ethics incidents, but police have filed cases for investigation; Douyin popularity ranking is 24th (relatively hot); no obvious gap signals in historical admission anomalies for Xi'an Jiaotong University; Xi'an Jiaotong University is primarily engineering-oriented, and its History Category majors (Law, Liberal Arts Experimental Class, Foreign Languages and Literature, etc.) have low correlation with the university's advantageous disciplines; Law discipline is rated A-, while other liberal arts majors have no separate ratings.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law has high social popularity (recommended), Foreign Languages and Literature has moderate social popularity (wait-and-see); local History Category examinees were 149,000 in 2021 → 141,000 in 2025, with total examinees in 2026 at 393,700, estimated at about 155,100 based on the recent History Category proportion of approximately 39.4%, an increase of about 13,700 (+9.7%) from 2025, intensifying competition; the 2025 History Category undergraduate batch line is 442 points, special type line is 536 points, with little fluctuation in recent years; Xi'an Jiaotong University is located in Shaanxi (not local province), with a very small proportion of History Category enrollment in Hubei, offering no local preference advantage.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as stable 2025 rankings, 11% enrollment reduction in 2026 easing competition, 9.7% increase in History Category examinees intensifying competition, slightly negative reputation mildly suppressing application enthusiasm, and the hot Law major attracting candidates, the increase in examinees and enrollment reduction offset each other, with rankings expected to remain roughly stable and slightly advance; predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1406, with a range of 1206–1606.
